Text.Text: All Open Pits And Coastal Mines
All Old World Distilleries and Mezcal Bar
All New World Distilleries and Champagne Cellar
Allows the allocation of more specialists on trade unions.
Allows the allocation of more specialists on harbourmaster offices.
Allows the allocation of more specialists on town halls.
Allows the allocation of more specialists on arctic lodges.

Founder leader of the Skylander Engineers Company. While Rudolph's original objective was to create a place to allow himself to do personal projects the company quickly outgrew its objective, now a multinational that gathers talent far and wide to supply it ever increasing needs involved in all sorts of endeavours. Still he can still be found on his office designing and discarding mostly fully functional prototypes.

S.E.C Technicians Department Leader. Romeo's ingenious and efficient designs are universally adaptable, covering all variables and leaving no margin for errors. His department provides all the necessary blueprints for a high maintainable and scalable company.

S.E.C Craftsmans Department Leader. Roman's skill, experience and charisma ensures the workers stay productive and the products high quality. His department provides all the necessary products for a high reliable and functional company.

S.E.C Arctic Explorer. Despite having worked all his life in the cold arctic Raymond's heart hasn't frozen. Offers a warm welcome and always has the right words to start a conversation. With ancient advice and oceanic experience pierces through the hardships and the ice with ease.
Romulus Skylander, The Stalwart Storm Breaker

S.E.C Storm Breaker and Remus brother. No matter how hard the wind blows Romulus can push through any storm. His vast knowledge on arctic tools and techniques allows him to break out of the tempestous winds this frozen landscape has to offer. Legend has it he and his brother where raised by an arctic wolf, but unlike the legend he didn't kill his brother.
Remus Skylander, The Steadfast Storm Trooper

S.E.C Storm Trooper and Romulus brother. No matter how hard the wind blows Remus can withstand any storm. His vast knowledge on arctic survival tactics allows him to endure the bitter temperatures this frozen landscape has to offer. Legend has it he and his brother where raised by an arctic wolf, but unlike the legend he wasn't killed by his brother.

Battleship variant of the same one used on land defenses. The S.E.C soon realized this gun was as good defensive weapon as an offensive one so they quickly adapted some for its battleships, proving the versatility of the S.E.C designs.

Airship variant of the same one used on land defenses. Fast moving aerial targets are more difficult to hit wich meant less firepower at a higher rate and precision was needed, the gattling guns used in land proved the perfect match to the challenge, proving once again the versatility of S.E.C designs.

This state of the art howitzer model was designed by the S.E.C to upgrade the defenses of its vast network of islands, keep up with the more belligerent rival advances and to deal with the usual troublemaker too.

When the S.E.C company took air they knew this also opened a new front for its enemies, they designed this fully automatic defense turret not just to delivery quantity but also quality to its flying guests.

When bigger and more resilient ships started to roam the seas it was obvious the usual cannon fire was far too ineffective, thats when this monstrosity was created and its fame as the most fearsome weapon consolidated.
The Flak Ironclad is an upgraded version of the flak monitor, sturdier and carrying three times the firepower.
This compact version of the battle cruiser is more versatile and cheaper at the cost of some firepower.
A heavily upscaled version of the battle cruiser, devastating in every sense but slow, pricier and difficult to mantain.
A smaller version of the cargo ship, the same reliability for smaller errands.
An smaller version of the White Shark provided by Capitain Tobias intended for smaller intercontinental deliveries.
Certified explosives full and claustrophobia free.
Leaves large puddles and hills in the wake of his exhaustive quarrying.
Dr. Ali Al-Zahir, The Botanical Director
He is the greatest of all time.
Produces intricate colorful patterns using dyes produced from local grown flowers and vegetables.
Wants to unleash all her research knowledge into the world.

S.E.C Harbourmaster. Whennever there's a new venture for the company Rembrandt is the first one to volunteer, be it kickstarting new settlements or managing the capital harbours he finds great joy providing insight on needs and procedures. Is great friends with Captain Rafferty, after all he is the one he encounters the most on his everyday work.

S.E.C Harbour Inspector. Reynard knows that in every trading company is bound to have a contraband problem, wich is easy to find if you know where to look. Instead of trying to eradicate it why not make use of it? after all negotiations are bound to go well when the alternative is a cold cell. For some reasons the freed contacts are always in jail at the start of his next shift.

S.E.C Harbour Inspector. Reynold knows that in every trading company is bound to have a contraband problem, wich is easy to spot if you are thorough. Instead of wasting it why not put it to good use? after all the smugglers wont be needing it anymore and the company is always in need of weapons. For some reason the captured smugglers are always free at the start of his next shift.

S.E.C Army General. The longer Roderick fights the fiercer he becomes, having triumphed over endless holdouts and dire situations his fame precedes him, when he takes command the soldiers recover their will to fight and the people feels reassured.
S.E.C Offense Colonel. With courage and bravery, will fight to the very end. Rostislav will deliver maximum damage with force and precision. Works great in conjunction with Radivoje.
S.E.C Defense Colonel. With vigilance and intelligence, will never be caught of guard. Radivoje will provide maximum strategic advantage. Works great in conjunction with Rostislav.

S.E.C Security Engineer. Chief of the city security department, Reginald was contracted by de S.E.C. to oversee city planning and construction, with the sole objective to minimize incidents and malcontent on the population.

S.E.C Security Planner. Tactician of the city security department, Renault preventive and proactive plans ensure the city does not fall by fire, illness or destructive rage. When they do happen though he also has a corrective plan for it.

S.E.C Security Technician. Troubleshooter of the city security department, Reinhardt is a resourceful problem solver, his technical skills and charisma makes him the perfect responder when trouble arise. Though thanks to the department efforts he is rarely seen in action.

S.E.C City Administrator. A company is as strong as the amount of people working for it and a well supplied population can really work wonders. Roderick makes sure the populace has everything they need and more, after all we need at least double the usual workforce for its recurrent world changing endeavours.

S.E.C City Treasurer. A company is as capable as the amount of money people spend on it and well invested money can really work wonders. Revaz makes sure the populace pay the correct price for the company products, after all the company needs every bit of money it can get for its usually expensive endeavours.

S.E.C City Spokesman. A company is as stable as the mood of the people and happy workers can really work wonders. Renat makes sure the people are happy with the products the company provides, after all the company needs an stable foundation for its equally stressful endeavours.

S.E.C Hacienda Patroness. In this brand new world people dont have the same needs as in the old one. Reina was assigned this region for her deep understanding on the needs and traditions of its people, after all who better to lead than someone born and raised on these lands.

S.E.C Exports Appraiser. In this brand new world products are not the same as the ones in the old one. Rivaldo makes sure the company is not robbed of the real value of the marvels these lands have to offer and in doing so, secures the financial future of the region and its people.

S.E.C Carnival Coordinator. In this brand new world life is not the same as in the old one. Roberto knows how to lift people spirits and that means to celebrate big time, loud music and tasy foods thats the way life is enjoyed on these lands. After all who can revolt when the biggest worry is a hangover.

S.E.C Ambassador. The land of lions is characterized by its unique people. Raghad was appointed to act as a bridge that connects our cultures and mediates the delicate balance of the region of Enbesa. The company is not here to appropiate, profit or destroy, but to help its people to thrive and progress in its own ways.

S.E.C Craftsman. The land of lions is characterized by its unique products. Rayyan is not only talented at the intricate production methods involved but also knowledgable on the relevance and value of each item produced. The company must show the world that in every little detail there is more than meets the eye.

S.E.C Preserver. The land of lions is characterized by its unique traditions. Ridwan has deep connection to the historic richness of these lands and its people, their stories and traditions are to be preserved, recorded and perpetuated. The company must show the world the cultural importance of the blessed lands of Enbesa.

S.E.C Meteorologist. The arctic region is inhospitable and with a blizzard on top even worse, thats why the S.E.C was so quick on recruiting a meteorologist when the arctic expeditions started and Roxanne accurate predictions of the region climate were vital on the company first steps on the snow.
Contracted by the S.E.C, IkKanattuk is in charge of providing practical information about survival on the arctic, ensuring the company uses the correct tool and people for the challenge ahead.
Contracted by the S.E.C, Iggettuk is in charge of providing counsel in regards of the every day life on the arctic, ensuring the company pays close attention to the wellbeing of the people.
Aether Aldebrand The Arctic Gas Expert

S.E.C Fleet Admiral. Named after a faraway freedom fighter, Raynor is known for having its heart and mind in the right place. His skills were severely needed after the S.E.C met its rivals on their way to new regions.
S.E.C Fleet Vice-Admiral. Rowan will achieve peace and order at all costs, be it by reason or force, specially force. Always at odds with Ronan even when their ways are usually the same.
S.E.C Fleet Vice-Admiral. Ronan will achieve chaos and revolt at all costs, be it by force or... force, specially force. Always at odds with Rowan even if their ways are usually the same.

S.E.C Trade Fleet Captain. On high seas he is master of his vessel and its cargo, on port he has memorized and optimized all the necessary procedures to ensure no problems arise when trading. When the company went global his talents were greatly appreciated. Is great friends with Rembrandt.

S.E.C Trade Fleet Merchant. Not to be confused with her twin sister Roselle. While her sister studied Rosemary travelled all across the world experiencing trade historic relevance, culture diversity, diplomatic exhanges. Has experience, controls the conversation flow and drives a hard bargain. With the help of her sister no deal is out of reach and the company is always on the winning side. Has long hair.

S.E.C Trade Fleet Expert. Not to be confused with her twin sister Rosemary. While her sister travelled Roselle dedicated her whole life to the study of mathemathics, statistics, finances and international trade. Has knowledge, gives accurate information about any product both natural or man-made. With the help of her sister no deal is out of reach and the company is always on the winning side. Has short hair.

S.E.C Salvagers Oceanographer. Ryszard comes from an ancient family of oceaonographers and has found countless historical wrecks and treasures, now contracted by the S.E.C in collaboration with Old Nate to search the depths of the oceans old, new, frozen and far. Weirdly enough the under the sea was the place were science, history and treasure hunting were to join hands.

S.E.C Salvagers Radar Operator. Second in command Rutger is to tell Rostam what every blip and blop means, the sunken depths of the ocean are endlessly vast and pitch dark, to search and detect, to see the unseen, thats the radar operator job.

S.E.C Salvagers Bell Diver. Third in command Rostam is to follow Rutger directions and dive into the sea, the sunken depths of the ocean are full of valuables, monetary and historically, to dive into the unknown and resurface what has been lost, thats the diver job.

S.E.C Highfleet Admiral. When the highfleet was assigned there was not many that could be chosen to fill it ranks, just a bunch of technicians and 'crazy enough to drive flying torpedos' pilots, so naturally Rex the craziest among them all got the admiralty.

S.E.C Highfleet Gunner. The battleskies proved the most challenging shooting gallery and Reuben proved an even better sharpshooter, his field of vision 360 degrees, his accurate predictions prophetic like, no enemy will escape his sights.
S.E.C Highfleet Loader. Dexterious and efficient Rebecca keeps the gunner weapon well fed, round and round it goes until theres no more because what else is a munition loader to do.

S.E.C Airship Technician, Practical skills really make miracles when facing problems mid air, a thorough technician Roger makes sure his machine runs smooth and it shows, with him at command sets new records with each delivery.

S.E.C Airship Mechanic, In charge of the ship engines Ruzgar makes sure they are well mantained, he knows its limits and makes good use of them, and when the ship is docked works on the most insane upgrades and designs.
S.E.C Airship Loader, Fast and nimble Ryder ensures the cargo is tightly secured and well organized, manages the ships capacity to the most minuscule detail in order to make the most of every voyage.
